user.title: Add a PollenWatch location
user.description: Pollen data comes from the Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service (CAMS) via Open-Meteo and covers Europe. The location is fixed once set — to move it later, remove and re-add the integration.

data_description.location: Pick the point to monitor. Open-Meteo snaps it to the nearest ~10 km grid cell.
data_description.allergens: Which pollen species to create sensors for.

error.out_of_coverage: This location is outside CAMS European coverage. Choose a location within Europe.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Open-Meteo. Check your connection and try again.

init.title: PollenWatch options
init.description: The location is fixed; remove and re-add the integration to change it.

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll Open-Meteo. Minimum 60 minutes to be a good citizen on a free public API.
data_description.enable_polleninformation: Adds a second source. Requires a free API key from polleninformation.at.
data_description.country: The country whose pollen network covers your location.
data_description.api_key: Stored encrypted in Home Assistant; never written to disk in plain text.

error.country_required: Select a country to enable polleninformation.
error.invalid_api_key: polleninformation rejected the API key. Check it and try again.
error.out_of_coverage: polleninformation has no data for this location in the selected country.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach polleninformation. Check your connection and try again.
